name: 多维策略拆解器
description: 将推广需求深度拆解为人群、内容、发布和 KPI 模块。
description_en: Decomposes promotion requirements into Audience, Content, Publishing, and KPI modules.
author: ycz.me

name: 小红书发布执行引擎
description: 处理小红书具体发布逻辑，包含坐标匹配与点击序列控制。
description_en: Handles XHS publishing logic, including coordinate matching and click sequence control.
author: ycz.me

name: 安卓真机远程指令集
description: 通过 SSH 连接实现对手机 Termux 的直接指令下发与文件管理。
description_en: Direct command execution and file management for Android Termux via SSH.
author: ycz.me

name: 手机真机指令集 (TAP-MCP)
description: 封装 Termux HTTP API，提供安卓真机的物理操控能力。
description_en: Wraps Termux HTTP API to provide physical control capabilities for Android devices.
author: ycz.me

name: 小红书网页自动化
description: 基于 Puppeteer 实现的小红书笔记自动发布工具，支持扫码登录持久化。
description_en: Puppeteer-based automation for Xiaohongshu, supporting persistent login and auto-publishing.
author: ycz.me
